sessions.intent: Create comprehensive builder architecture and eval strategy document

before.assumptions: Builder works for simple hello world. Two-pass LLM strategy exists but needsDetail is crude. No eval suite. Prior work in builder-improvement-options.md.
before.risk: Low — planning/documentation session, no code changes

sessions.intent: Implement Data.Compare, 38 eval .goal files, and eval runner

before.assumptions: Data class exists at PLang/App/Data/this.cs as partial class. No Compare method exists. 127 module actions registered. .pr format uses Json.CamelCaseIndented with [Store] filtering. Builder works for existing test .goal files.
before.risk: Medium — new method on core Data class, 38 new files. Compare method must handle JSON boxing issues (int/long/double).

sessions.plan: 1. Add Data.Compare as new partial file (this.Compare.cs) — JSON-level structural diff. 2. C# tests for Compare. 3. Write 38 eval .goal files per architect catalogue. 4. Build, verify .pr output, save as .golden. 5. Write eval runner PLang goal.

sessions.intent: Convert action handler properties from plain types to Data<T> in list/, loop/, math/, event/ modules

before.assumptions: Data.@this<T> wrapper exists and is used in file/ modules already. Pattern is established. Source generator handles lazy resolution.
before.risk: Medium — many files, mechanical but must be precise with .Value/.Value! access in Run() methods.

sessions.intent: Make builder correctly unwrap Data<T> in type names, valid values, and parameter type stamping

before.assumptions: GetTypeName doesn't unwrap Data<T>, GetValidValues doesn't unwrap Data<T>, NormalizeParameterTypes doesn't stamp missing types from schema. UnwrapType already exists for schema discovery but isn't used elsewhere.
before.risk: Low — additive changes to existing methods, no behavior change for non-Data types

sessions.plan: 1. Add Data<T> unwrapping to GetTypeName() and GetValidValues() in TypeMapping.cs. 2. Add parameter type stamping from action schema in NormalizeParameterTypes(). 3. Add C# tests for all changes. 4. Verify with dotnet build and test run.

actions.context: Added Data<T> unwrapping in GetTypeName() and GetValidValues()
Added parameter type stamping from action schema in NormalizeParameterTypes()
6 new tests for Data<T> unwrapping and Describe integration

after.notes: Ready for end-to-end verification with plang build

sessions.intent: Full 5-pass code analysis of all runtime changes on the branch

before.assumptions: Branch has ~200 changed files implementing Data<T> composition, return removal, condition orchestration, foreach inline, builder eval suite. Multiple coder sessions completed.

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis (OBP, Simplification, Readability, Behavioral, Deletion) on all changed C# runtime files. Focus on behavioral corners where the architectural changes could silently break existing PLang programs.

actions.context: Core Data changes: events, NeedsResolution, Value factory, AsEnumerable, As<T>, ShallowClone, ToBoolean, implicit operator
Variables: Data-aware Set, ResolveDeep depth guard + typed object mutation, bracket indexing
Condition orchestration and foreach inline body — the two major behavioral changes
Builder: PromoteGroups, validation suggestions, IBuildValidatable, Data<T> parameter wrapping
Source generator: Data<T> support, IStatic, field reset, __ResolveData
Entity hierarchy: IDataWrappable, Return removal, Handled break, AsData()

after.notes: 23 total findings. Critical: foreach drops dict support, ResolveDeep mutates shared templates, old .pr Return silently lost. Architecture direction is excellent OBP — issues are in migration edges.

sessions.intent: Re-review coder's fixes for v1 findings

before.assumptions: Coder addressed 10 of 13 v1 findings in commit db09e0f4 on fix-plang-tests. Changes span 28 files.

sessions.plan: 5-pass analysis on coder's fix commit. Verify each fix against original finding. Check for new issues introduced by the fixes.

actions.context: EnumerateItems(), Value caching, As<T> cache — all verified correct
ResolveDeep clone via MemberwiseClone — verified safe for string-only mutation
Condition guard moved to Context._data, foreach uses EnumerateItems
7 list modules rewritten to use Data.EnumerateItems/GetChild — excellent OBP

after.health: PASS — all critical fixes verified correct, 1 new LOW finding
after.notes: All 10 fixes correctly resolve v1 findings. 1 new LOW: count.cs dict count is O(n). 3 carried from v1 unaddressed. Ready for tester.

sessions.intent: Test quality analysis for full runtime2-builder-plan branch

before.assumptions: Branch has 693 files changed with multiple coder sessions. No prior tester analysis exists.

sessions.plan: Run C# test suite, collect Cobertura coverage, analyze test quality across all changed areas, hunt false greens, write test-report.json

actions.context: Ran full test suite: 2069 total, 2065 pass, 4 fail (non-deterministic LLM and actor settings tests)
4 critical coverage gaps: new production files with 0% test coverage
Test report, coverage data, verdict, and summary

after.health: FAIL — 4 critical gaps, 6 major issues, 5 minor
after.notes: 15 findings total. Critical: validateResponse (0%), list.any (0%), list.group (0%), promoteGroups (0%). Major: broken LLM retry test, actor settings leak, cache.store 0%, timer 0%. Send to coder for fixes.

sessions.intent: Re-evaluate test quality after fix-plang-tests merge

before.assumptions: fix-plang-tests branch merged by coder, bringing foreach dict fix, condition guard, list OBP rewrites, test restructuring with 142 PLang test files

sessions.plan: Run C# tests, collect coverage, run PLang tests, map v6 findings to fix outcomes, identify new issues, write updated report

actions.context: C# tests: 2071 total, 2069 pass, 2 fail. Improvement from 4 failures to 2.
PLang tests: 143 discovered, 57 ran, 86 silently skipped. Critical discovery.
Updated test report, v7 summary, verdict, v6 review mapping

after.health: FAIL — 2 critical, 8 major, 5 minor. New critical: 60% PLang tests silently skipped.
after.notes: Foreach dict and condition orchestration fixed. But PLang test runner skips 86/143 files. All condition/cache/crypto/event tests never execute. Send to coder.

sessions.intent: Address tester v7 C# findings: validateResponse tests, list.any/group tests, fix LLM retry assertion

before.assumptions: Tester found validateResponse 0%, list.any/group 0%, 2 broken LLM tests. PLang test runner skip issue noted but deferred.
before.risk: Low — adding tests and fixing one assertion

sessions.plan: Write validateResponse tests (8), list.any tests (4), list.group tests (3), fix LLM retry assertion. Skip PLang test runner — better tooling being built for it.

actions.context: 8 tests: valid response, wrong count, missing steps/index/actions, index gaps, null inputs, multiple errors
7 tests: any match/no-match/empty/not-equals, group by-key/empty/missing-key
Fixed assertion: 'LLM validation failed' instead of non-existent 'Validation failed after 3 retries'

after.health: 2085 passed, 1 failed (pre-existing LLM tool call snapshot issue)
after.notes: NOTE FOR TESTER: Ignore PLang tests for now — better tooling is being built for PLang test runner. Focus C# analysis only. The 1 remaining failure (Query_ToolCall_LlmRequestsToolAndHandlesError) is a snapshot data mismatch, not a code bug.

sessions.intent: Re-evaluate test quality after coder fixed v7 findings #2-#5

before.assumptions: Coder added 8 validateResponse tests, 7 list tests (any+group), fixed LLM retry assertion. PLang tests skipped per user.

sessions.plan: Run C# tests, analyze quality of new tests (deletion test, weak assertions, edge cases), update test-report.json

actions.context: 8 tests cover all error paths via IDictionary. JsonElement path (production) at 0%.
7 tests for any+group — solid edge cases, verify values not just success
Fixed assertion matches actual error message

after.notes: Coder fixes correct. New finding: JsonElement path in validateResponse untested. Suggest running security analyst next.

sessions.intent: Full security audit of runtime2-builder-plan branch — blue team + red team

before.assumptions: 147 runtime source files changed. Major areas: Data/Navigators, variable resolution, builder pipeline, HTTP/file/crypto/LLM modules, engine/goal/step execution, actor/config/cache/utils. Multiple coder sessions, 2085/2086 tests passing.
before.risk: Analysis only — no code changes. Risk is in missing security issues.

sessions.plan: Blue team: map attack surface across 147 changed files via 6 parallel agents (Data/Navigators, Variables, Builder, HTTP/File/Crypto/LLM, Engine/Goal/Step/Event, Actor/Config/Cache/Utils). Red team: exploit sketches for each finding. Filter through PLang threat model (user-sovereign, external data is the real attack surface).

actions.context: 3 HIGH findings: download no size limit (line 911-948), SSE buffer overflow (828-835), slow-loris no per-read timeout (290-330)
2 MEDIUM findings: timing side-channel on header comparison (line 104), nonce replay after restart (85-89)
2 MEDIUM findings: no element count limit (59-76), no explicit depth guard (45-56)
Info disclosure: absolute paths in error messages (39, 76), type names in errors (28)
MEDIUM: ResolveDeep no breadth guard (412-434)
Accepted risk SSTI: UnsafeMemberAccessStrategy + callGoal + app in AmbientValues. Confirmed MaxSteps now configured (100K)

after.health: FAIL — 3 HIGH open in HTTP module, 6 MEDIUM, 2 LOW
after.notes: 12 findings after threat-model filtering. HTTP module is the primary concern — its core job is safe external data handling. Send to coder for HTTP fixes.

sessions.intent: Fix all 11 open security findings from audit v1

before.assumptions: Security audit found 12 findings (1 accepted-risk). 3 HIGH in HTTP module, 6 MEDIUM, 2 LOW. All have clear fix proposals.
before.risk: Medium — touching HTTP transport, crypto verification, JSON parsing, and variable resolution. All fixes are additive guards.

sessions.plan: Fix F1 (download size limit), F2 (SSE overflow counter), F3 (slow-loris throughput), F11 (URL scheme), F7 (constant-time headers), F8 (nonce TTL documentation), F5 (JSON element count), F6 (JSON depth guard), F9 (path disclosure), F10 (ResolveDeep breadth), F12 (type name disclosure).

actions.context: F1: maxBytes param on StreamWithProgressAsync. F2: consecutiveOverflows counter in SSE. F3: throughput check in all read methods. F11: URL scheme validation in ResolveUrl.
F7: CryptographicOperations.FixedTimeEquals for header comparison. F8: documented existing timeout bounds nonce replay.
F5: MaxElementCount=100K with ref counter. F6: depth parameter with MaxDepth=64.
F9: removed path.Absolute from error message
F10: _resolveItemCount breadth guard at 100K
F12: removed GetType().Name from error message

after.notes: All 11 open findings fixed. F4 (Fluid SSTI) accepted-risk, skipped. Ready for security re-audit.

sessions.intent: Re-audit after coder fixed all 11 open security findings — verify fixes + fresh-eyes scan

before.assumptions: Coder fixed all 11 open findings from security v1. Changes in 6 files: DefaultHttpProvider, Ed25519Provider, JsonStringNavigator, DefaultFileProvider, Variables, ObjectNavigator.

sessions.plan: 1. Verify all 11 fixes by reading actual code (not just diff). 2. Fresh-eyes scan: HTTP SSRF/redirects/Content-Type, variable resolution ThreadStatic/injection/skipInfra, action dispatch type safety. 3. Write updated security-report.json + verdict.

actions.context: F1/F2/F3/F11 fixes verified correct. Fresh scan: no new HIGH. Low: throughput threshold generous, no SSRF IP filtering.
F7/F8 fixes verified correct. FixedTimeEquals + nonce bounded by timeout.
F5/F6 fixes verified correct. MaxElementCount + MaxDepth with proper threading.
F10 fix verified. New finding: ResolveDeep lacks skipInfrastructure (F13 MEDIUM).
Action dispatch verified secure: string lookup, no type injection, whitelist types.

after.health: PASS — 0 critical/high open, 1 medium, 2 low, 1 accepted-risk
after.notes: All v1 fixes correct. 3 new findings (F13-F15). Recommend auditor next.

before.assumptions: All 3 prior reviewers passed (codeanalyzer v2, tester v8, security v2). Branch has ~148 changed files under PLang/.
before.risk: Low — review-only session, no code changes

sessions.plan: Read all prior bot reports. Review full code diff focusing on cross-file contracts, clone family completeness, NotFound migration, Data.Value circular resolution, and gaps between reviewers.

actions.context: Core Data/Variables cross-file contract analysis. Found NeedsResolution race and clone family gap.
IStatic/condition orchestration cross-file analysis. Found scope dead code and Disabled concurrency concern.
Audit report and verdict written.

after.health: Branch is safe to proceed. Major finding (NeedsResolution race) is a trivial 2-line swap.
